The company operates in the financial compliance and regulatory technology sector, serving banks, asset managers, and other regulated institutions.

name: Farcast
summary: Farcast builds advanced flat panel antennas using phased array technology for satellite internet user terminals, enabling global connectivity for both stationary and mobile users across geostationary and low-earth orbit satellite networks. Their proprietary antenna technology reduces the size, weight, power, and cost of satellite communication systems while providing electronic beam scanning to track moving satellites or mobile users.

name: Fathom
summary: Fathom builds AI-powered meeting transcription and note-taking software that automatically records, transcribes, and summarizes video calls for teams using platforms like Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams. The product operates in the productivity and business communication space, helping knowledge workers capture and organize meeting information without manual documentation.

name: Fernstone
summary: Fernstone is an insurance brokerage that provides commercial insurance and risk management services for fast-growing businesses. They assign each client a dedicated risk advisor to manage coverage, handle claims and renewals, and monitor evolving business exposures across multiple insurance carriers.

name: Fieldguide
summary: Fieldguide builds compliance and audit management software that helps organizations streamline their risk assessment and third-party vendor evaluation processes. The platform operates in the enterprise software and governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) domain, serving financial institutions, healthcare providers, and other regulated industries that need to conduct and document assessments efficiently.

name: Finary.com
summary: Finary builds a personal wealth management platform that aggregates financial accounts and investments from multiple institutions to give users a unified view of their portfolio and net worth. The company operates in the fintech and personal finance software space, helping individuals track and manage their assets across banks, brokerages, crypto exchanges, and real estate holdings.

name: Finni Health
summary: Finni Health builds software and clinical services for weight management, offering a telehealth platform that connects patients with healthcare providers for medication-based obesity treatment. The company operates in the digital health and chronic disease management space, focusing on prescription medications like GLP-1 agonists combined with remote monitoring and behavioral support.

name: Finto
summary: Finto builds financial management software designed to help small businesses and freelancers manage invoicing, expenses, and cash flow through a cloud-based platform. The company operates in the financial technology sector, serving as an accounting and bookkeeping tool for self-employed professionals and small enterprises.

name: Fintual
summary: Fintual is a Chilean fintech company that provides automated investment management and robo-advisor services, allowing retail investors to build diversified portfolios of stocks and bonds through a digital platform. The company operates in the wealth management and investment advisory domain, targeting individual investors in Latin America who seek low-cost, algorithm-driven portfolio management.

name: Finvest
summary: Finvest builds an AI-powered wealth management platform called Finn that helps users analyze their finances, automate money decisions, and optimize their investments through a unified interface. The platform operates in the personal finance and wealth management domain, offering services like financial monitoring, portfolio optimization, tax efficiency, and automated money management accessible to individual investors.

name: Firecrawl
summary: Firecrawl builds an API platform that converts websites into clean, structured data suitable for use with large language models and other AI applications. The service operates in the web scraping and data extraction domain, enabling developers to programmatically access and process web content without managing the complexity of browser automation or handling dynamic JavaScript-rendered pages.

name: Firstbase.io
summary: Firstbase.io provides a platform that automates business formation and compliance tasks for entrepreneurs, handling services like entity registration, registered agent services, and ongoing compliance filings across US states. The company operates in the legal technology and business administration space, serving startups and small business owners who need to establish and maintain their corporate structures.

name: Flagright
summary: Flagright builds compliance and financial crime detection software for regulated financial institutions, including banks, fintech companies, and payment processors. Their platform uses machine learning and rule-based systems to identify suspicious transactions, monitor customer behavior, and help organizations meet anti-money laundering (AML) and know-your-customer (KYC) regulatory requirements.

name: Flai
summary: Flai builds AI-powered virtual receptionists that handle customer communications for car dealership service departments across calls, SMS, and email, automating appointment scheduling, recall notifications, and customer re-engagement to reduce missed opportunities and free up human staff for higher-value interactions.

name: Fleek
summary: Fleek builds infrastructure and tools for deploying and hosting applications on decentralized networks, primarily focusing on enabling developers to run websites and applications on IPFS and other Web3 protocols. The company operates in the decentralized web hosting and blockchain development tools space, providing services that reduce dependence on traditional centralized cloud providers.

name: Fleetzero
summary: Fleetzero builds Leviathan, a modular marine battery energy storage system designed to electrify and hybridize ships of various sizes. The company operates in the marine energy sector, providing scalable battery solutions that enable vessel decarbonization while achieving cost parity with traditional fossil fuel propulsion systems.

name: Flex
summary: Flex builds software that helps small business owners manage their finances, including invoicing, expense tracking, and financial reporting tools. The company operates in the financial software and small business accounting space.

name: FlutterFlow
summary: FlutterFlow is a visual development platform that enables developers to build web and mobile applications using Flutter without writing code for UI design and layout. The company operates in the low-code/no-code development tools space, allowing users to create fully functional apps through a drag-and-drop interface while retaining the ability to integrate custom code and backend services.

name: Formal
summary: Formal builds a protocol-aware data security proxy that parses 15+ wire protocols to enforce least-privilege access policies at the query level, protecting databases, data warehouses, and infrastructure from unauthorized access and data exposure. The company operates in the data security and access governance domain, serving organizations that need to secure database access, mask sensitive data for compliance, govern AI agent interactions, and audit user sessions across their infrastructure.

name: Formance
summary: Formance builds a payments orchestration platform that helps financial services companies and enterprises manage complex payment workflows across multiple payment methods and providers. The company operates in the fintech infrastructure space, specifically focused on payment processing, reconciliation, and financial transaction management.

name: Foundation
summary: Foundation builds a customer experience platform for homebuilders that includes white-labeled mobile and web applications for buyers and an integrated portal for internal teams. The platform operates in the residential construction and homebuilding sector, enabling buyers to track build progress, access documents, and submit warranty requests while providing builders with tools for sales productivity, customer satisfaction, and team coordination.

name: Freshpaint
summary: Freshpaint builds a customer data platform that automatically captures, unifies, and activates first-party customer data across websites and applications without requiring code changes. The platform operates in the martech and CDP space, enabling businesses to sync customer data to marketing tools, analytics platforms, and other downstream systems while maintaining compliance with privacy regulations.

name: FurtherAI
summary: FurtherAI builds domain-specific AI software that automates document processing and data extraction workflows for insurance professionals, including carriers, MGAs, brokers, and reinsurers. The platform handles tasks like submission intake, underwriting, claims processing, and policy verification across commercial property, auto, cyber, life and health, and excess and surplus insurance lines.

name: Garage
summary: Garage builds an open-source, distributed object storage system designed for self-hosted and decentralized storage infrastructure. The company operates in the cloud storage and infrastructure software domain, providing an alternative to centralized cloud storage services for organizations seeking data sovereignty and control.

name: Gather
summary: Gather builds a spatial video chat platform that enables remote teams and communities to interact in a customizable 2D virtual environment where users control avatars and proximity-based audio creates a more natural communication experience. The platform operates in the remote work and virtual events domain, serving organizations that want alternatives to traditional video conferencing with features like private conversations, themed spaces, and integrated collaboration tools.

name: Gecko Robotics
summary: Gecko Robotics builds robotic systems and software for inspecting and maintaining critical infrastructure, particularly in the energy and industrial sectors. Their autonomous robots perform non-destructive testing and inspection of equipment like boilers, pipes, and pressure vessels to detect corrosion and defects without requiring human workers to enter hazardous environments.

name: General Legal
summary: General Legal is an AI-native law firm that provides contract review and negotiation services for growth-stage companies, delivering turnarounds in hours at flat-fee pricing through a Slack-integrated interface. They operate in the legal services domain, specifically handling commercial, employment, incorporation, and fundraising agreements for startups and early-growth businesses.

name: Gerald Technologies, Inc
summary: Gerald Technologies, Inc builds an AI-powered financial advisory platform that provides personalized investment and wealth management recommendations to individual investors. The company operates in the fintech and robo-advisory space, offering automated financial guidance through its digital platform.

name: Giga
summary: Giga builds AI agents for enterprise customer support that can handle conversations across chat and voice channels while minimizing hallucinations through a correction mechanism. The company operates in the customer service automation domain, offering a platform called Agent Canvas that enables businesses to deploy customized support agents grounded in company policies and compliance rules.

name: Glimpse
summary: Glimpse builds an AI-powered platform that automates financial operations for consumer packaged goods and retail companies, specifically handling deductions management, revenue recovery, and cash application. The company operates in the CPG and retail finance domain, serving natural, beauty, drug, convenience, and mass retail channels.

name: GoCardless
summary: GoCardless builds payment infrastructure and recurring billing software that enables businesses to collect payments via bank transfers and direct debit across multiple countries. The company operates in the fintech and payments processing domain, serving e-commerce, SaaS, and subscription-based businesses that need to manage recurring revenue and automate payment collection.

name: Goldbelly
summary: Goldbelly operates an e-commerce marketplace that enables specialty food producers and restaurants to ship their products directly to consumers across the United States. The platform focuses on gourmet foods, baked goods, prepared meals, and other culinary items sourced from established restaurants and artisanal food makers.

name: GoLinks
summary: GoLinks builds a link management platform that enables organizations to create and manage short, branded URLs (like go/myproject) that route to longer web addresses, documents, and resources. The company operates in the enterprise software and productivity tools domain, serving teams that need to simplify internal communication and knowledge sharing across their organization.

name: Gordian Software
summary: Gordian Software builds an API platform that enables travel platforms and airlines to offer and manage ancillary products like seat selection and baggage services across their booking flows. The company operates in the airline travel technology space, providing connections to multiple airlines and fulfillment infrastructure to help travel platforms maximize ancillary revenue.

name: GovDash
summary: GovDash builds an AI platform designed to help businesses win and manage government contracts, covering the full lifecycle from opportunity discovery and capture through proposal development, contract management, and operations. The company operates in the government contracting domain, serving contractors and businesses that pursue federal and public sector contracts.

name: GovEagle
summary: GovEagle builds a generative AI platform that helps government contractors prepare and win federal bids and proposals by automating compliance checks, generating proposal drafts, managing knowledge repositories, and performing solution solutioning across requirements. The company operates in the government contracting space, serving public sector teams and federal contractors competing for government awards.

name: Gradia Health
summary: Gradia Health builds software and services that enable healthcare providers to deliver integrated, concierge-style care to their patient populations at scale. The company operates in the healthcare technology and care delivery domain, focusing on helping providers improve patient outcomes while optimizing their financial performance.

name: Great Question
summary: Great Question builds a platform for collecting, organizing, and managing customer feedback and insights across multiple channels. The company operates in the customer experience and product management software domain, helping businesses gather and act on feedback from their users.

name: Green Canopy NODE
summary: Green Canopy NODE builds prefabricated mass timber building kits and provides integrated development services for multi-unit residential projects, operating in the sustainable housing and construction technology sector. They focus on accelerating home construction through off-site manufacturing and prefabrication while delivering all-electric, net-zero energy homes.

name: Greenboard
summary: Greenboard builds an AI-native compliance software platform that helps financial institutions manage SEC and FINRA regulatory requirements across communications, employee conduct, marketing, and firm operations. The company serves financial advisors, broker-dealers, hedge funds, private funds, and RIAs, enabling them to consolidate their entire compliance program into a single unified system.

name: Gridware
summary: Gridware builds a platform called Active Grid Response that provides real-time visibility into electrical, physical, and environmental conditions across power grids by deploying sensors at utility poles to detect hazards like fallen limbs and damaged power lines. The company operates in the electric utility and grid infrastructure domain, helping utilities prevent outages and improve public safety by eliminating the "Hazard Awareness Delay" that typically occurs when utilities only discover grid hazards after they cause failures.

name: Groww
summary: Groww is an Indian financial technology platform that provides retail investors with tools to invest in stocks, mutual funds, ETFs, and fixed income securities through a mobile-first interface. The company operates in the wealth management and investment technology domain, serving individual investors seeking to build and manage their investment portfolios.

name: Hamming AI
summary: Hamming AI builds an automated testing and monitoring platform specifically designed for voice and chat agents, enabling enterprises to test agents before launch and monitor their performance in production. The platform serves financial services, healthcare, and technology companies that deploy conversational AI agents and need to ensure reliability, compliance, and quality at scale.

name: Happl
summary: Happl builds a global employee benefits platform that enables companies to manage core benefits, flexible allowances, insurance policies, and employee gifting across multiple countries while automating compliance and administrative tasks. The platform serves HR and Finance teams seeking to streamline benefits enrollment, gain insights into employee benefits usage, and reduce manual administrative work for organizations operating internationally.

name: HappyRobot
summary: HappyRobot builds an AI agent platform that deploys autonomous AI workers to handle end-to-end tasks across enterprise business functions like customer support, sales, finance, operations, and logistics. The company operates in the enterprise software space, focusing on complex operational environments where AI agents can be evaluated, trained on real-time data, and coordinated alongside human teams.

name: Harper
summary: Harper Insure builds a digital platform for commercial business insurance, offering policies across general liability, professional liability, cyber insurance, commercial auto, and other coverage types to businesses across industries like trucking, tech, and construction. The company operates in the commercial insurance brokerage and placement domain, using technology and market access to match businesses with appropriate coverage.

name: Healthtech 1
summary: Healthtech 1 builds software that automates administrative tasks for GP practices in England, specifically handling patient registrations and lab test filing. The company operates in the primary care technology sector and is used by approximately 25% of England's GP practices.

name: Heart Aerospace
summary: Heart Aerospace develops electric aircraft powered by hydrogen fuel cells, focusing on regional aviation for short to medium-range flights. The company operates in the aviation and clean energy sector, designing aircraft intended to replace turboprop and regional jet aircraft while reducing carbon emissions.

name: Heron Data
summary: Heron Data builds supply chain visibility and procurement intelligence software that helps enterprises track supplier performance, manage logistics networks, and optimize sourcing decisions. The platform aggregates and analyzes real-time data on shipments, inventory, and supplier activities to provide actionable insights across manufacturing, retail, and distribution industries.

name: HitPay
summary: HitPay is a payment solutions platform that enables businesses in Southeast Asia to accept digital payments through multiple channels including online payments, point-of-sale systems, and invoicing. The company operates in the fintech and payments processing industry, serving merchants who need to process transactions across e-commerce, retail, and service-based businesses.

name: Hive
summary: Hive builds project management and collaboration software that helps teams organize work, track progress, and communicate across tasks and projects. The platform operates in the workplace productivity and team collaboration domain, serving organizations that need to coordinate work across multiple team members and departments.

name: Hive Health
summary: Hive Health builds and operates tech-enabled health maintenance organization (HMO) plans specifically designed for small and medium-sized enterprises in the Philippines. The company provides comprehensive health coverage with features like teleconsultations, mental health services, and streamlined digital administration through an HR dashboard and member portal.

name: HockeyStack
summary: HockeyStack builds a revenue intelligence platform that helps B2B sales and marketing teams track buyer engagement across digital touchpoints and attribute revenue to specific marketing campaigns and sales activities. The company operates in the sales and marketing technology domain, serving mid-market and enterprise organizations that need to understand how their go-to-market efforts drive pipeline and closed deals.

name: Hubble Network
summary: Hubble Network builds a satellite IoT constellation that provides global connectivity for IoT devices in remote and underserved areas without existing cellular infrastructure. The company operates in the satellite communications and Internet of Things domain, offering narrowband connectivity services to enable tracking, monitoring, and communication for applications across industries like agriculture, maritime, and logistics.

name: Hudu
summary: Hudu builds a documentation and knowledge management platform designed specifically for managed service providers (MSPs) and IT service companies to centralize and organize their technical documentation, client information, and internal processes. The platform operates in the IT service management and business operations software domain, helping service providers streamline their documentation workflows and improve client deliverability.

name: Humaans
summary: Humaans builds an HR operations platform that helps companies automate and streamline workflows across hiring, onboarding, and people management. The platform operates in the human resources technology domain, serving mid-market and enterprise organizations looking to reduce manual HR administrative work.

name: Human Interest
summary: Human Interest builds retirement plan administration software that helps small and medium-sized businesses set up and manage 401(k) plans, IRAs, and other retirement savings programs for their employees. The company operates in the fintech and benefits administration space, providing compliance management, payroll integration, and employee education tools to simplify retirement plan sponsorship.

name: Hypercore
summary: Hypercore builds an AI-powered platform that automates enterprise sales workflows, including lead qualification, outreach, and deal management for B2B sales teams. The company operates in the enterprise sales automation and artificial intelligence software domain, helping organizations streamline their go-to-market processes through autonomous agents and workflow automation.

name: Hypercubic
summary: Hypercubic builds agentic AI software designed to help enterprises modernize their mainframe systems by capturing institutional knowledge, understanding legacy code, and automating migration to modern architectures. The company operates in the enterprise software and mainframe modernization space, serving large organizations and governments that rely on critical legacy infrastructure.

name: Icarus
summary: Icarus builds APOLLO, a solar-powered, autonomous high-altitude platform that operates in the stratosphere above 60,000 feet to provide persistent aerial surveillance and communications. The company operates in the space-based sensing and intelligence domain, offering real-time imaging and low-latency connectivity as an alternative to traditional satellite systems.

name: Infisical
summary: Infisical builds an open-source secrets management platform that helps engineering teams securely store, manage, and sync sensitive data like API keys, database credentials, and environment variables across their applications and infrastructure. The company operates in the DevOps and application security domain, providing both self-hosted and cloud-based solutions for teams of various sizes.

name: Inkeep
summary: Inkeep builds AI-powered customer support chatbots and search solutions that integrate with company documentation and knowledge bases to answer customer questions automatically. The company operates in the enterprise software space, serving businesses that need to reduce support costs while improving customer self-service through AI assistants.

name: Innate
summary: Innate builds MARS, an open-source general-purpose robot designed for home use that runs a complete AI stack including BASIC, a programmable foundation agent that enables the robot to reason about goals, call skills, and adapt in real time. The company operates in the consumer robotics domain, offering a robot platform that ships with onboard compute and allows users to program custom behaviors, add skills, and extend functionality through an open ecosystem.

name: Inscribe
summary: Inscribe builds AI-powered document fraud detection software that helps banks, credit unions, and lenders identify fraudulent and deepfake documents during the lending and account opening process. The platform uses machine learning to catch document fraud that manual review processes and legacy systems miss, enabling financial institutions to prevent fraud at scale.

name: Instrumentl
summary: Instrumentl builds a grant discovery and management platform that helps nonprofits, researchers, and educational institutions identify and track funding opportunities from foundations and government agencies. The platform operates in the nonprofit funding and grants management domain, providing tools to match organizations with relevant grants and streamline the application process.

name: Inversion Space
summary: Inversion Space builds advanced reentry vehicles designed to deliver payloads from space to anywhere on Earth in under an hour, with their flagship product Arc serving as an autonomous, reusable space-based delivery system for defense and logistics applications. The company operates in the space technology and hypersonics domain, developing spacecraft and reentry capsules that can operate through extreme atmospheric conditions and land with high precision.

name: Invert
summary: Invert develops synthetic biology software and tools for designing and optimizing cell therapies, particularly CAR-T cell therapies for cancer treatment. The company operates in the intersection of computational biology and cell therapy manufacturing, providing platforms that help researchers and clinicians engineer immune cells more efficiently and predictably.

name: Invopop
summary: Invopop builds cloud-based software for automating invoicing, billing, and financial document management for businesses. The company operates in the financial technology and enterprise software domain, serving small to medium-sized businesses that need to streamline their accounts receivable and document processing workflows.

name: Jinba
summary: Jinba builds an AI workflow automation platform that enables business teams to create, deploy, and execute enterprise workflows using natural language, visual interfaces, and code, operating across industries including banking, insurance, manufacturing, legal, sales, and human resources.

name: JITX
summary: JITX builds software tools that automate the design and layout of printed circuit boards (PCBs), allowing engineers to programmatically generate hardware designs rather than manually creating them through traditional CAD interfaces. The company operates in the electronic design automation (EDA) space, specifically targeting the PCB design workflow.

name: Junction
summary: Junction builds a customer data platform that helps companies unify customer information from multiple sources and activate that data across their marketing and business tools. The platform operates in the enterprise software space, specifically within the customer data management and marketing technology domain.

name: Kingdom
summary: Kingdom builds fermentation infrastructure and equipment for producing kombucha, water kefir, and other live culture beverages at commercial scale. They operate in the functional beverage and fermentation technology domain, serving producers who want to manufacture cultured drinks with standardized processes.

name: Klarity
summary: Klarity builds an Organizational Context Graph platform that captures and structures operational knowledge from business processes, enabling AI agents and teams to make faster, better-informed decisions during organizational transformations. The company operates in the enterprise software domain, serving finance, IT, HR, operations, and go-to-market transformation initiatives across large organizations.

name: Knowtex
summary: Knowtex builds a voice AI platform that automates clinical workflows and documentation tasks for healthcare providers, converting natural conversation into structured clinical notes, coding, and administrative work. The company operates in the healthcare technology domain, specifically serving clinicians across 200+ medical specialties to reduce administrative burden and improve operational efficiency in clinical settings.

name: Kodex
summary: Kodex builds a software platform designed to centralize and streamline the intake, processing, and reporting of law enforcement data requests and subpoenas. The company operates in the legal compliance and data governance domain, serving government agencies, financial institutions, cryptocurrency companies, telecommunications providers, and other regulated organizations that regularly handle data requests from law enforcement.

name: Koko
summary: Koko builds peer support technology and digital mental health tools designed to provide immediate emotional support and crisis intervention to individuals experiencing mental health challenges. They operate in the mental health and behavioral wellness domain, offering AI-assisted and community-powered platforms that connect people in distress with supportive resources and trained peer supporters.

name: Kombo
summary: Kombo builds APIs and infrastructure that enable software companies to integrate with applicant tracking systems (ATS) and human resources platforms, allowing developers to standardize data exchange across fragmented HR software ecosystems. They operate in the HR technology integration space, serving as a middleware layer that abstracts the complexity of connecting to multiple ATS providers like Workday, Greenhouse, and Lever.

name: Lago
summary: Lago builds an open-source billing and metering platform that helps SaaS companies and subscription businesses manage complex pricing models, usage tracking, and invoice generation. The platform operates in the domain of billing infrastructure and revenue operations, serving as a backend system for companies that need to implement consumption-based, tiered, or hybrid pricing structures.

name: LanceDB
summary: LanceDB builds an open-source vector database designed to store, index, and search high-dimensional vector embeddings alongside structured metadata. The company operates in the domain of AI infrastructure, enabling developers to build retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) applications and vector search systems for machine learning workloads.

name: Latent
summary: Latent builds software that uses artificial intelligence to detect early signs of disease from medical imaging scans, operating in the healthcare diagnostics domain. Their platform analyzes medical images to identify abnormalities that might indicate conditions like cancer or other serious diseases before they become advanced.

name: Legalist
summary: Legalist provides litigation finance and legal funding services, offering capital to law firms and individual plaintiffs to fund ongoing lawsuits in exchange for a return of proceeds if the case succeeds. The company operates in the legal services and alternative finance sector, focusing on commercial litigation, personal injury, and other civil cases.

name: LemFi
summary: LemFi builds financial infrastructure that enables remittance flows from diaspora communities in developed countries to recipients in Africa, with a focus on reducing costs and improving speed compared to traditional money transfer services. The company operates in the cross-border payments and fintech space, facilitating transactions primarily from the United States and Europe to countries across the African continent.

name: Lightdash
summary: Lightdash builds an open-source business intelligence platform that enables teams to create and share dashboards and metrics directly from their data warehouse. The platform operates in the data analytics and BI tools space, connecting to warehouses like Snowflake, BigQuery, and Redshift to help organizations visualize and explore their data.

name: LineLeap
summary: LineLeap is a mobile app and venue management platform that allows users to skip lines, pay cover charges, and purchase event tickets at bars and nightlife venues across the United States. The company operates in the nightlife and entertainment technology space, serving over 2 million users and partnering with more than 800 bars and venues.

name: Lio (formerly askLio)
summary: Lio builds an AI-powered assistant that helps users research, analyze, and understand complex topics by synthesizing information from multiple sources and providing detailed, cited answers. The platform operates in the knowledge work and research productivity domain, serving users who need to quickly gather and comprehend information across various subjects.

name: LiteLLM
summary: LiteLLM builds an open-source Python library that provides a unified interface for calling multiple large language models from different providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and others through a single API. The company operates in the developer tools and infrastructure space, enabling developers to write model-agnostic code and easily switch between LLM providers without rewriting their applications.

name: LiveFlow
summary: LiveFlow builds automated financial reporting software that connects accounting systems like QuickBooks and Xero to spreadsheets and business intelligence tools, enabling real-time access to financial data without manual exports or data entry. The company operates in the financial software and accounting automation domain, serving finance teams and accountants who need to streamline their reporting workflows.

name: Long Term Stock Exchange
summary: Long Term Stock Exchange operates a registered national securities exchange that lists publicly traded companies and provides trading infrastructure for equities. The exchange emphasizes long-term business performance through corporate governance features like extended holding periods for founder shares and multiplied voting rights that reward patient capital.

name: Loula
summary: Loula builds a platform that enables doulas to accept insurance payments and manage their practices, handling credentialing with health plans, insurance billing, and visit tracking. They operate in the doula services and healthcare administration domain, currently serving doulas across California.

name: Lucid Bots
summary: Lucid Bots manufactures autonomous drones and robots for commercial exterior building cleaning, including window washing, facade cleaning, and pressure washing services. The company's primary product is the Sherpa cleaning drone, which has over 400 active operators across North America generating more than $75 million in cumulative revenue, along with the Lavo autonomous ground cleaning robot for outdoor commercial applications.

name: Lucis
summary: Lucis builds a preventive health platform that conducts comprehensive health check-ups analyzing 110+ biomarkers through a network of 400 partner labs across Europe, allowing users to track their biology twice yearly and receive personalized action plans based on their results. The company operates in the preventive healthcare and wellness domain, helping individuals monitor key health markers and develop daily habits to address issues like fatigue, sleep quality, mental clarity, and digestive health.

name: Luminai
summary: Luminai builds an AI platform that automates administrative and operational workflows for health systems, handling tasks like referral intake, patient registration, provider inbox management, pharmacy renewals, and insurance denial appeals. The company operates in the healthcare technology sector, specifically focused on reducing operational burden for large health systems so clinical teams can prioritize patient care.

name: Mach9
summary: Mach9 builds Digital Surveyor, an automated 3D mapping and feature extraction software that uses AI-powered machine learning to analyze LiDAR data and extract infrastructure features like utility poles, curbs, and paint lines from mobile mapping data. The software operates in the geospatial and surveying domain, serving survey and geospatial services companies, transportation agencies, and telecom providers who need to convert raw scanning data into design-grade CAD and GIS deliverables.

name: Magic Patterns
summary: Magic Patterns builds an AI-powered design tool that generates user interface components and design patterns based on text prompts and design specifications. The company operates in the design automation and web development tools space, enabling designers and developers to quickly create functional UI code.

name: Maihem
summary: Maihem builds AI monitoring, testing, and red-teaming software that enables enterprises to evaluate and validate the safety, performance, and security of AI systems before and after deployment. They operate in the domain of AI quality assurance and trustworthiness, offering modules to test retrieval-augmented generation systems, agentic workflows, and customer experience scenarios at scale.

name: MarqVision
summary: MarqVision builds software that helps brands monitor and protect their intellectual property across digital channels, detecting unauthorized use of trademarks, counterfeit products, and brand infringements online. The company operates in the brand protection and intellectual property enforcement domain, serving businesses that need to track and take action against misuse of their brands across e-commerce platforms, social media, and the broader internet.

name: Mashgin
summary: Mashgin builds autonomous checkout systems that use computer vision and artificial intelligence to enable cashierless transactions in retail environments like convenience stores, airports, and corporate cafeterias. Their hardware and software platform allows customers to place items in front of a camera-equipped kiosk, which automatically identifies products and processes payments without requiring a cashier or barcode scanning.

name: MaverickX
summary: MaverickX develops precision chemical solutions for the oil and gas, mining and metals, and water treatment industries, offering products like PetroX for oilfield operations, LithX for metal extraction, and HydroX for wastewater treatment. The company specializes in creating safe, biodegradable, and environmentally-compliant chemistry tailored to resource extraction and processing applications.

name: Mem0
summary: Mem0 builds a memory layer for AI applications that enables large language models and AI agents to retain, recall, and learn from past interactions and context across conversations. The platform operates in the AI infrastructure domain, providing developers with tools to add persistent memory capabilities to chatbots, virtual assistants, and autonomous agents.

name: Mercura
summary: Mercura builds software for enterprise supply chain management, focusing on helping companies manage supplier relationships, procurement processes, and supply chain visibility. The platform operates in the enterprise software domain, serving manufacturing, retail, and other industries that depend on complex supplier networks.

name: Meru Health
summary: Meru Health builds a digital mental health platform that delivers app-based therapy and psychiatric care for depression and anxiety disorders. The company operates in the digital therapeutics and mental health treatment space, offering clinician-supported programs that combine cognitive behavioral therapy with mobile technology.

name: Metal
summary: Metal builds AI-powered software that helps founders identify and qualify investors for their fundraising efforts, using data analysis and intelligence tools to match startups with relevant venture capital investors based on stage, sector, geography, and other specific criteria. The company operates in the fundraising technology and investor intelligence domain, serving early-stage startups and founders seeking capital.

name: Method Financial
summary: Method Financial builds software and financial infrastructure for independent financial advisors and wealth management firms to streamline client management, portfolio tracking, and advisory operations. The company operates in the financial technology and wealth management sector, serving registered investment advisors and similar professional advisory practices.

name: Meticulous
summary: Meticulous builds AI-powered testing software that automatically generates and maintains test cases for web and mobile applications. The company operates in the software quality assurance and continuous integration domain, helping development teams reduce manual testing effort and improve code reliability.

name: Metriport
summary: Metriport builds an API platform that enables healthcare applications to access and exchange patient medical records across fragmented health systems and electronic health record (EHR) networks in the United States. The company operates in the healthcare interoperability space, specifically addressing the challenge of aggregating patient data from multiple providers and hospitals through standardized data exchange protocols.

name: Mezmo
summary: Mezmo provides a cloud-based observability platform that aggregates, processes, and analyzes logs from applications and infrastructure across distributed systems. The company operates in the application performance monitoring and logging analytics space, serving DevOps teams and enterprises that need to troubleshoot issues and gain insights from their system data.

name: Middesk
summary: Middesk builds a verification and compliance platform that helps businesses confirm the legitimacy and details of other companies during onboarding and ongoing monitoring. The company operates in the B2B fintech and compliance domain, serving customers in financial services, payments, and other regulated industries that need to verify business identity and regulatory status.

name: Minicor
summary: Minicor builds an RPA (robotic process automation) platform powered by AI and computer-use agents that automates desktop workflows and deploys AI into legacy systems. The platform enables organizations to run scalable desktop automations across Windows VMs, browsers, on-premise, cloud, and Citrix environments, with self-healing agents that adapt when UI elements change and built-in observability for debugging and monitoring automation runs.

name: Mobot
summary: Mobot builds an AI-powered mobile testing platform that uses mechanical robots to automate manual testing on physical devices, serving engineering teams, QA departments, and marketing organizations that need to test mobile apps and campaigns at scale. The company operates in the mobile quality assurance and testing automation domain, offering both fully-managed testing services and self-service testing capabilities alongside mobile campaign monitoring tools.

name: ModernLoop
summary: ModernLoop builds an AI-powered recruitment platform called Taylor AI that automates interview scheduling and candidate communication throughout the hiring process. name: Momentic
summary: Momentic builds AI-powered testing agents that automatically generate, execute, and maintain end-to-end tests for web and mobile applications. name: Motion
summary: Motion builds an AI-powered calendar and task management platform that automatically schedules tasks, meetings, and deep work blocks based on user priorities and available time. summary: Nango builds an integration platform that helps software companies connect their applications to external APIs and third-party services without having to manage the underlying authentication and data synchronization complexity. name: NanoNets

summary: Navattic builds interactive product demo software that allows companies to create guided, clickable walkthroughs of their applications without requiring code. name: Nourish
summary: Nourish builds a digital platform that helps food and beverage brands manage their nutritional labeling, compliance, and product formulation data across different markets and regulations. The company operates in the food tech and regulatory compliance domain, serving manufacturers who need to navigate varying nutritional labeling requirements across jurisdictions.

name: Nova Credit
summary: Nova Credit builds a credit reporting platform that allows immigrants and international individuals to access credit scores and financial history from their home countries and have that data recognized by U.S. lenders and financial institutions. The company operates in the fintech and credit reporting domain, enabling underserved populations to build credit profiles in the United States by leveraging their existing financial track records from abroad.

name: Nox Metals
summary: Nox Metals supplies cut-to-size aluminum plates to American manufacturers from its Detroit facility, using AI-powered software to optimize cutting patterns, inventory forecasting, and instant quoting. The company operates an on-demand metal supply business where customers upload material specifications and receive quotes and lead times within seconds through its Gondor platform.

summary: Numeral builds sales tax and VAT compliance software for ecommerce and SaaS companies, automating tax registration, filing, and remittance across US states and over 70 countries. The platform monitors sales thresholds to identify tax obligations, prepares and files returns, manages exemption certificates, and handles payment remittance on behalf of customers.

name: Observe.AI
summary: Observe.AI builds conversation intelligence software that records, transcribes, and analyzes customer service interactions across voice, video, and digital channels to help contact centers improve agent performance and compliance. summary: Odeko builds supply chain management software for restaurants, helping operators manage inventory, automate ordering from suppliers, and control food costs across their locations. The platform operates in the restaurant technology and food service supply chain domain.

name: Oneleet
summary: Oneleet builds a compliance platform that helps SaaS companies obtain SOC 2, ISO 27001, and other security certifications faster than traditional platforms by integrating security controls directly into the process. summary: OneSchema builds data import infrastructure that enables SaaS companies to accept, validate, and map customer data files without requiring custom integration work. summary: Onshore builds software that helps companies identify and claim tax incentives, particularly research and development credits, by combining AI analysis with expert human review to maximize tax benefits while minimizing the work required from client teams. summary: Onyx is an open-source AI chat platform that connects to your company's documents, applications, and people to provide grounded answers based on your team's knowledge. summary: Optery is a privacy service that helps individuals remove their personal information from data broker websites and opt out of public records databases. The company operates in the digital mental health and neurotechnology domain, focusing on making brain imaging more interpretable and clinically useful for healthcare providers.

summary: Outschool operates an online marketplace that connects students with independent teachers offering live, small-group and one-on-one classes across a wide range of subjects including academic tutoring, arts, music, coding, and enrichment topics. summary: Outset builds AI-powered software that automates customer research and feedback collection for product teams and marketers. The company operates in the market research and customer insights domain, helping businesses conduct interviews, surveys, and qualitative research at scale.

summary: Photoroom builds AI-powered image editing software that automatically removes backgrounds, adds custom backdrops, and enhances product photos for e-commerce and content creation. The platform enables customer experience teams to review interactions, generate AI-powered training simulations, and continuously improve agent quality and resolution speed.

name: Solva
summary: Solva builds AI software for insurance claims processing that automates FNOL triage, damage assessment, and quality assurance across insurance carriers' operations. The company operates in the insurance claims management domain, providing domain-specific tools that audit claim portfolios, identify coverage violations, detect leakage, and surface compliance gaps with source-cited insights rather than black-box recommendations.

name: Sorcerer
summary: Sorcerer builds software for carbon accounting and emissions management, helping organizations measure, track, and report their greenhouse gas emissions across Scopes 1, 2, and 3. The platform operates in the climate tech and sustainability reporting domain, serving enterprises that need to monitor their environmental impact and comply with emissions disclosure requirements.

name: Spherecast
summary: Spherecast builds an AI-powered supply chain management platform designed for consumer packaged goods brands that automates planning, forecasting, and execution across purchases, transfers, and production. The platform integrates with existing ERP systems and data warehouses to replace manual spreadsheet-based processes and enable teams to optimize inventory levels and forecast accuracy.

name: Sphinx
summary: Sphinx builds documentation generation tools and search infrastructure for software projects, allowing developers to create searchable, maintainable documentation from source code and markdown files. They operate in the developer tools and technical documentation domain.

name: SpruceID
summary: SpruceID builds open-source infrastructure and tools for decentralized identity and verifiable credentials, enabling individuals and organizations to create, manage, and present cryptographic proofs of identity and claims without relying on centralized authorities. They operate in the digital identity and Web3 sectors, focusing on standards-based solutions like W3C Verifiable Credentials and decentralized identifiers (DIDs).

name: Spur
summary: Spur builds testing infrastructure and observability tools designed to help development teams validate and monitor their applications across different environments and conditions. The company operates in the software development and quality assurance domain, focusing on making it easier for engineers to catch bugs and performance issues before code reaches production.

name: StackAI
summary: StackAI builds a no-code platform that enables users to create and deploy AI applications by connecting various APIs and language models through a visual workflow interface. The platform operates in the enterprise software and artificial intelligence automation space, allowing businesses to build custom AI tools without requiring coding expertise.

name: Starcloud
summary: Starcloud builds orbital data centers designed to host artificial intelligence computing workloads in space, leveraging continuous solar energy and radiative cooling to achieve gigawatt-scale computational capacity. The company operates in the space infrastructure and hyperscale computing sectors, addressing the power, cooling, and permitting constraints that limit data center expansion on Earth.

name: Stepful
summary: Stepful is an online education platform that offers flexible, competency-based training programs in skilled trades such as electrical work, plumbing, HVAC, and welding, designed to help students earn certifications and enter the workforce without traditional four-year degrees. The company operates in the vocational and technical education sector, partnering with employers and trade unions to provide affordable alternatives to conventional apprenticeships.

name: Strada
summary: Strada builds software that helps colleges and universities manage student employment, internships, and career development outcomes. The platform operates in the higher education technology domain, serving institutions that need to track and report on student work experiences and career readiness metrics.

name: StratumAI
summary: StratumAI builds AI-driven software for resource modeling in mining operations, using their proprietary SAIGE technology to improve grade control, geometallurgical, and geotechnical modeling from multivariate geostatistical data. The company operates in the mining sector, helping producers optimize decision-making during production and mine expansion to increase mined grades, reduce waste, and improve overall project economics.

name: Subsets
summary: Subsets builds an AI retention automation platform designed for consumer subscription businesses to predict churn, run experiments on retention strategies, and automatically activate campaigns to engage and retain subscribers. The platform operates in the subscription and retention marketing domain, serving commercial teams who need to improve customer lifetime value without requiring engineering resources.

name: Suger
summary: Suger builds a cloud-based platform that enables software vendors to manage and monetize their products through various subscription and licensing models, including usage-based pricing, seat-based licensing, and tiered subscriptions. They operate in the SaaS commerce and billing infrastructure domain, serving independent software vendors and SaaS companies that need to handle complex pricing, billing, and revenue recognition.

name: Sully.ai
summary: Sully.ai builds AI-powered tools for managing and optimizing construction project workflows, focusing on automating documentation, compliance tracking, and communication processes for the construction industry. The platform helps construction teams streamline administrative tasks and improve project coordination through artificial intelligence.

name: Sunflower
summary: Sunflower builds digital tools and community support services for people seeking to reduce or quit alcohol consumption. The platform operates in the substance use recovery and mental health wellness domain, offering features like progress tracking, peer support, and educational resources.

name: SwiftSku
summary: SwiftSku builds centralized back office software for independent convenience store owners that integrates with existing POS systems to manage operations, fuel pricing, promotional discounts, and real-time business intelligence. The company operates in the convenience store technology and point-of-sale solutions domain, serving c-store retailers with mobile app capabilities for transaction monitoring, inventory management, and remote price updates.

name: Sygaldry Technologies
summary: Sygaldry Technologies builds quantum-accelerated AI servers that combine multiple qubit modalities to speed up training and inference for artificial intelligence models. The company operates in the quantum computing and AI infrastructure domain, developing hardware and tools to integrate quantum capabilities into AI systems for applications in materials science, drug discovery, and other computationally intensive fields.

name: Synapticure
summary: Synapticure provides virtual care and specialist neurology services for patients with neurodegenerative diseases including Parkinson's, Alzheimer's, ALS, and other movement and cognitive disorders, operating within the telehealth and specialized healthcare domain. Their services are covered by insurance, available across all 50 states, and include treatment for conditions affecting memory, cognition, motor control, and mental health support for both patients and caregivers.

name: sync.
summary: Sync. builds AI-powered lipsync and visual dubbing software that automatically synchronizes actors' lip movements to dialogue in video content across multiple languages, camera angles, and lighting conditions. The company serves film studios, content creators, and media production professionals who need to match dialogue to footage for dubbing, localization, and post-production workflows through both API and plugin integrations.

name: Tajir
summary: Tajir operates an app-based B2B wholesale platform in Pakistan that connects retailers and small stores with brands and distributors for inventory purchasing. The platform enables 24/7 ordering with next-day delivery, transparent pricing, and software-powered fulfillment across categories including rice, beverages, and household products.

name: Taktile
summary: Taktile builds an agentic decision platform designed for financial institutions that combines AI agents with human oversight to automate and accelerate critical workflows such as customer onboarding, credit decisions, AML investigations, fraud detection, and insurance underwriting. The platform operates in the financial services domain, serving banks, insurance companies, and other regulated financial organizations that need to make faster, compliant decisions at scale.

name: Tavus
summary: Tavus builds AI-powered video personalization software that enables businesses to create and send individualized video messages at scale. The platform operates in the marketing automation and customer engagement domain, allowing companies to generate personalized videos for outreach, sales, and communication purposes without requiring manual video production for each recipient.

name: Teleport
summary: Teleport builds open-source and commercial access management software that provides unified control over SSH servers, Kubernetes clusters, databases, and web applications through a single identity plane. The company operates in the infrastructure security and identity access management domain, serving organizations that need to enforce consistent authentication, authorization, and audit logging across distributed infrastructure environments.

name: Tempo
summary: Tempo builds AI-powered home fitness equipment and a connected platform that combines a mirror display with computer vision technology to provide real-time form correction and personalized workout guidance. The company operates in the consumer fitness and home workout technology sector, targeting individuals who want coached strength training and functional fitness experiences in their homes.

name: Tenjin
summary: Tenjin builds mobile app marketing and analytics software that helps developers and marketers measure user acquisition campaigns, retention, and lifetime value across iOS and Android platforms. They operate in the mobile app marketing technology domain, providing attribution tracking and performance analytics to optimize app growth and advertising spend.

name: Tennr
summary: Tennr builds an agentic patient orchestration platform that uses proprietary models trained on payer criteria mappings to automatically route patients through complex healthcare journeys, manage payer authorizations, and reduce claim denials for healthcare providers and networks. The platform operates in healthcare operations and patient flow management, helping providers navigate insurance requirements and coordinate care across multiple touchpoints.

name: Termius
summary: Termius builds a cross-platform SSH client and terminal application that enables secure remote access to servers and infrastructure. The company operates in the cybersecurity and developer tools domain, providing features like key management, team collaboration, and connection organization for IT professionals and development teams.

name: Tesorio
summary: Tesorio builds software for accounts receivable automation that helps finance teams manage cash flow by streamlining invoice collection, payment matching, and customer communications. The company operates in the financial software domain, serving mid-market and enterprise businesses that need to optimize their billing and collections processes.

name: The Centre for Effective Altruism
summary: The Centre for Effective Altruism builds a community and research infrastructure dedicated to identifying the most effective ways to improve the world through evidence and reason. They operate in the domain of charitable giving and cause prioritization, providing frameworks and analysis to help individuals and organizations direct resources toward high-impact interventions addressing global problems like poverty, animal welfare, and existential risks.

name: The Good Food Institute
summary: The Good Food Institute is a nonprofit research and policy organization that supports the development and commercialization of plant-based and cultivated meat alternatives to conventional animal agriculture. They operate in the food technology and sustainability sector, providing technical assistance, funding, and advocacy to advance alternatives that reduce environmental impact and improve food security.

name: The Robot Learning Company
summary: The Robot Learning Company develops software and algorithms that enable robots to learn from human demonstrations and adapt their behaviors to perform complex manipulation tasks across manufacturing, logistics, and service robotics applications. Their platform uses machine learning techniques to reduce the time and cost required to program and deploy robotic systems for real-world industrial use cases.

name: Thndr
summary: Thndr builds a mobile app that enables users in emerging markets to invest in fractional shares of stocks and ETFs with small amounts of capital, operating in the fintech and retail investing domain. The platform focuses on making stock market participation accessible to underserved populations through a simplified interface and low minimum investment requirements.

name: Tint
summary: Tint builds AI-powered tools for managing and analyzing user-generated content (UGC) at scale, helping brands aggregate, curate, and display customer photos and videos across their marketing channels. The company operates in the marketing technology and content management space, serving e-commerce and retail businesses that want to leverage authentic customer content for social proof and marketing campaigns.

name: Titan
summary: Titan builds software and provides financial advisory services for individual investment management, offering robo-advisory portfolios and personalized wealth management tools. The company operates in the digital wealth management and financial services domain, serving retail investors seeking automated portfolio construction and professional investment guidance.

name: Toma
summary: Toma builds an AI operating system that handles customer conversations and administrative tasks for automotive dealerships, including appointment scheduling, lead qualification, and inbound customer service across phone and digital channels. The company operates in the automotive retail sector, specifically serving new and used car dealerships with AI agents that manage customer interactions and integrate with dealership management systems.

name: Topline Pro
summary: Topline Pro builds an all-in-one software platform designed to help service professionals and trades businesses win more work, manage projects, and streamline operations through AI-powered tools. The platform operates in the service industry space, offering solutions for lead generation, customer communication, scheduling, quoting, and project management specifically tailored to trades professionals like landscapers, contractors, and other local service providers.

name: Tovala
summary: Tovala builds a smart countertop cooking appliance that uses steam, convection, and broiling to prepare meals, combined with a subscription meal delivery service that provides pre-portioned ingredients and QR-coded recipe cards that sync with the machine. The company operates in the connected kitchen appliance and meal kit delivery sectors, targeting home cooks seeking convenient, guided meal preparation.

name: Trace
summary: Trace builds an AI orchestration platform that automates cross-departmental workflows by coordinating AI agents with human judgment based on contextual understanding of how a company operates. The platform operates in the enterprise workflow automation and operational AI space, helping teams manage complex multi-step processes like client onboarding and contract review.

name: Traverse
summary: Traverse is a research lab that produces training data for frontier AI models in subjective, judgment-heavy domains like law, healthcare, and strategic decision-making by capturing how real experts reason through ambiguous scenarios. They partner with AI labs to create datasets that enable models to develop taste and context-awareness for economically valuable work that lacks deterministic solutions.

name: Treasury Prime
summary: Treasury Prime builds APIs and infrastructure that enable fintechs and software platforms to embed banking-as-a-service capabilities, allowing their customers to open accounts, transfer funds, and access other financial services without building these systems from scratch. The company operates in the financial technology and banking infrastructure space, serving as an intermediary between non-bank software companies and the regulated banking partners that provide the underlying financial services.

name: Trela
summary: Trela builds a software platform for managing and optimizing logistics operations, specifically focused on freight transportation and supply chain visibility in Brazil. The company operates in the logistics technology domain, providing tools for real-time tracking, route optimization, and fleet management for transportation companies and logistics providers.

name: True Link
summary: True Link builds financial products and services designed specifically for older adults, including prepaid debit cards with fraud protection features and financial management tools. The company operates in the senior financial services and consumer finance sector, focusing on helping aging populations manage money safely and combat financial exploitation.

name: TrueNorth
summary: TrueNorth builds cloud-based fleet management software that helps transportation and logistics companies track vehicles, optimize routes, and manage driver safety. The company operates in the commercial fleet management and telematics industry, serving businesses that rely on vehicle fleets for their operations.

name: Truss

The company operates in the financial technology and payments processing domain, serving merchants and enterprises that need integrated payment systems.

The company operates in the AI governance and compliance domain, serving established companies and academic institutions that need to enforce policies and manage risks at the interaction level while maintaining innovation speed.

name: Understood Care
summary: Understood Care builds a virtual patient-advocacy service that connects Medicare members with licensed patient advocates and registered nurses to help with insurance claims, appeals, care coordination, and navigation of healthcare services. The company operates in the healthcare services domain, specifically serving Medicare-eligible populations seeking personalized support for medical advocacy and care management.

name: Usul
summary: Usul builds an AI platform that helps government contractors identify, pursue, and win federal contracts by automatically matching opportunities to their capabilities, connecting them with decision-makers at contracting offices, and providing competitive intelligence on pricing and incumbent contractors. The company operates in the government contracting and defense procurement space, serving contractors across the federal market.

name: Vapi
summary: Vapi builds an API platform that enables developers to create and deploy voice AI agents that can make and receive phone calls. The platform operates in the conversational AI and voice technology domain, allowing businesses to automate customer interactions through natural language conversations over phone lines.

name: Variance

The company operates in the sales enablement and revenue intelligence domain, serving sales organizations that need visibility into team performance and customer conversations.

summary: Vellum builds a platform for developing, testing, and deploying large language model applications, offering tools for prompt engineering, evaluation, and monitoring across production environments. name: VergeSense
summary: VergeSense builds computer vision and occupancy sensing software that uses overhead cameras and AI to track how office spaces, conference rooms, and desks are being utilized in real time. summary: Verifiable builds a platform for employment and income verification that allows employers, landlords, and other organizations to electronically verify applicant information directly from authoritative sources like employers and financial institutions. name: Verto

name: Vitalize

The company operates in the ambulatory surgical center (ASC) and orthopedic healthcare services domain, focusing on delivering orthopedic care outside of traditional hospital settings.

name: Wallbit

name: Warp
summary: Warp builds a terminal emulator designed for software developers that replaces the traditional command line interface with a modern, AI-assisted approach featuring features like command search, completion, and collaboration capabilities. name: Zeit AI

name: ZeroDev
summary: ZeroDev builds smart contract wallets and account abstraction infrastructure that enables developers to create embedded wallets and custom transaction logic for blockchain applications. name: Zip

name: Spellbrush

summary: DeepMind is an artificial intelligence research laboratory owned by Google/Alphabet that develops machine learning systems and algorithms, with a focus on creating AI agents capable of solving complex problems across domains like games, protein folding, and scientific discovery. The company operates primarily in foundational AI research, publishing their findings and developing AI systems that tackle challenges in biology, physics, mathematics, and other scientific fields.

name: Proclaim
summary: Proclaim builds practice management and electronic health record (EHR) software specifically designed for small to mid-sized pain management and interventional practices. The platform helps these clinics manage patient scheduling, billing, clinical documentation, and compliance requirements within the healthcare domain.

name: Aurora Innovation
summary: Aurora Innovation develops autonomous driving software and technology for commercial trucking applications. The company operates in the autonomous vehicle industry, focusing specifically on long-haul freight transportation.

name: Galaxy Digital
summary: Galaxy Digital is a merchant bank and investment firm that builds financial products and infrastructure for the digital assets and cryptocurrency ecosystem. The company operates across multiple domains including asset management, trading, lending, and venture capital investing, primarily serving institutional and professional clients in the blockchain and cryptocurrency space.

name: Interactive Brokers
summary: Interactive Brokers is a financial services company that provides electronic brokerage services, allowing retail and institutional investors to trade stocks, options, futures, forex, bonds, and other securities across multiple global markets. The company operates as a broker-dealer offering trading platforms, clearing services, and custodial accounts for self-directed investors.

name: Keboola
summary: Keboola builds a cloud-based data integration and orchestration platform that helps organizations connect, transform, and prepare data from multiple sources for analytics and business intelligence. name: Lambda Labs
summary: Lambda Labs builds GPU cloud computing infrastructure and hardware systems designed for machine learning, AI, and deep learning workloads. summary: Meltano builds an open-source platform for data integration and transformation that helps organizations extract data from various sources, load it into data warehouses, and transform it for analytics. name: Sisense
summary: Sisense builds business intelligence and analytics software that enables organizations to connect, process, and visualize data from multiple sources to support data-driven decision-making. name: Tenable
summary: Tenable builds vulnerability management and cyber risk quantification software that helps organizations identify, prioritize, and remediate security weaknesses across their IT infrastructure, cloud environments, and operational technology systems. The company operates in the cybersecurity domain, providing platforms and tools that enable enterprises to understand and manage their exposure to cyber threats.

name: CD Projekt Red
summary: CD Projekt Red is a Polish video game developer that creates role-playing games and action games for PC and console platforms, most notably the Witcher series and Cyberpunk franchise. The studio is known for developing narrative-driven, open-world games with extensive storytelling and player choice mechanics.

summary: MongoDB develops a NoSQL document database platform that stores data in flexible JSON-like documents rather than traditional relational tables, serving developers and enterprises across industries including financial services, healthcare, retail, and technology who need scalable database solutions with flexible schemas.

name: Lyft
summary: Lyft operates a ride-hailing platform that connects passengers with drivers using mobile applications to request on-demand transportation services in cities across North America. name: Databricks
summary: Databricks builds a unified analytics platform that combines data warehousing, data engineering, and machine learning capabilities on top of an open lakehouse architecture. The company operates in the data and analytics infrastructure domain, serving enterprises that need to manage, process, and derive insights from large-scale data workloads.

name: Cloudflare
summary: Cloudflare builds a global network platform that provides content delivery, security, and performance services for websites and internet applications. The company operates in the web infrastructure and cybersecurity domains, offering services such as DDoS protection, Web Application Firewalls, DNS management, and SSL/TLS encryption to businesses of all sizes.

name: Pinterest
summary: Pinterest is a visual discovery and bookmarking platform where users collect, organize, and share images, videos, and ideas through digital pinboards, primarily serving as a content curation tool for fashion, home décor, recipes, DIY projects, and lifestyle inspiration. summary: Twilio builds cloud-based communication APIs and platforms that enable developers to integrate voice, video, messaging, and authentication capabilities into applications and business processes. name: Okta

name: Spotify
summary: Spotify operates a music and podcast streaming platform that allows users to access millions of songs, albums, and audio content on demand across devices. name: Snowflake
summary: Snowflake is a cloud-based data platform that provides data warehousing, data lakes, and data sharing capabilities across major cloud providers including AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. name: Samsung Research America
summary: Samsung Research America conducts research and development across semiconductor technology, artificial intelligence, display technology, and consumer electronics to create products and solutions for Samsung's global business units.
